calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 676 Geary Street LLC is present. Represented by Ann Rollandi.
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ami Alexander is present.
Attorney Riat E. Tautkus representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-27-2012 is vacated.
